title: cirsium × tirolense
intro: Cirsium × tirolense is a hybrid plant species within the thistle family, resulting from the cross between Cirsium heterophyllum and Cirsium waldsteinii. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Cirsium × tirolense include relieving symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
